title: Fisher Investments Reviews the Importance of Benchmarking
text: Constructing a portfolio can be difficult, and we have found that without some kind of guide, choosing your investments from the thousands available today can be a tall order. In our experience, basing your portfolio on a diverse, broad model of the market—called a benchmark—can be a good place to start.
